reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the HUD strip and swap texture regions or whole images according to the HP state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_hp_torch_strip_3slot_24x8.png through AssetServer during HUD bootstrap and anchor it to the upper-left safe margin.
runtime_notes: HUD offset uses the 8 px margin from the GDD, scaled into the 1280x720 output.
The strip sits in UI space and never scrolls with the world camera.
Texture swaps follow HP changes with no tweening to preserve crisp pixel art.

context.usage: Top-left HUD strip that shows three torch icons, with filled and dim states for current health.

shape.silhouette: Three-slot torch icon strip with bright, dim, and empty torch states arranged in a single row.

acceptance_criteria: Each torch slot occupies an 8x8 region with a one-pixel gutter-free alignment.
Filled and dim torch states remain readable against the dark vignette in the upper-left corner.
